bead.title: bd fallback: document how to wire bd as the bead-tracker backend (fallback path)
bead.description: Single artifact under docs/ explaining how to wire bd as the backend if axon adoption stalls. Touches: install bd, point .ddx/config.yaml backend: bd, validate. No code change required if backend.go already supports it.
bead.acceptance: 1. docs page exists with concrete steps. 2. Verified by running locally with bd installed (or noting the gap if bd isn't installable on the dev machine).
